base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of save_point_map_icons — a ui from 1997 final fantasy vii. World-map icons + save points + weapon/accessory/item sprites. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: World-map icons + save points + weapon/accessory/item sprites
